title: thelypteris resiliens
intro: Thelypteris resiliens, a species of fern, is a vascular plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical and subtropical regions and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as an anti-inflammatory agent. Thelypteris resiliens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
